data.title: BANANAS31, SIREN and mubarak are currently the top three coins in Binance voting
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Binance voting page shows: BANANAS31 (21.4%), SIREN (16.9%) and mubarak (12.8%) are temporarily ranked in the top three of Binance voting.
Earlier news, Binance announced the launch of the first voting event, where users can vote for tokens that have completed official due diligence, and the top two tokens will be eligible for Binance listing.

data.title: Wintermute currently holds approximately 7.688 million MUBARAK
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to The Data Nerd, Wintermute wallet holds about 77.688 million MUBARAK tokens, worth $966,000. In addition, Wintermute also holds 164 billion BABYDOGE, 18.82 billion CAT, and 4.549 million TUT.

data.title: Bitcoin Volatility Sparks Cautious Approach Among Community Members
data.description:
According to PANews, Adam, a macro researcher at Greeks.live, shared insights in a Chinese community briefing, highlighting a cautious stance towards Bitcoin volatility. The community is actively discussing whether Bitcoin will reach new lows, with a focus on constructing effective hedging structures and selecting cost-effective options strategies rather than merely predicting market trends.

In terms of options trading strategies, the community emphasizes the importance of choosing options that offer favorable pricing and implied volatility (IV). Most traders are inclined to reduce costs and prioritize cash flow direction, opting for covered/uncovered strategies to acquire assets at discounted prices, rather than concentrating solely on volatility trading.

data.title: Coinbase inks sponsorship with Australian rugby club Cronulla Sharks
data.description:
Coinbase has inked a sponsorship deal with Australian sporting outfit Cronulla Sharks. According to the announcement, the National Rugby League (NRL) club said the cryptocurrency exchange will have its insignia at the front of its players’ shorts for the 2025 season. Coinbase has joined other crypto companies that have inked sponsorship deals with sporting outfits, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/coinbase-sponsorship-with-cronulla-sharks/

data.title: South Korea’s crypto investor base surges over 50% last year
data.description:
A survey carried out on the 21st of March across five South Korean crypto exchanges revealed that the number of domestic crypto investors increased by over 50% last year.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/south-koreas-crypto-investor-base/

data.title: UAE Most Crypto-Obsessed Nation in 2025 as Global Digital Asset Adoption Surges: Research
data.description:
The UAE has been ranked the most crypto-obsessed nation in 2025, with over 25% of its population owning cryptocurrency.

The post UAE Most Crypto-Obsessed Nation in 2025 as Global Digital Asset Adoption Surges: Research first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/03/22/uae-most-crypto-obsessed-nation/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=uae-most-crypto-obsessed-nation
